articles.title: How to participate in Kusama Parachain Auctions! Polkadot Parachain
articles.description: Kusama crowd loans offer a win-win proposition that allows investors to contribute KSM tokens to their favorite projects and help them win a parachain slot on the Kusama network. In addition to contributing to their favorite projects, investors can receive rewards from supporting their favorite projects. In this video, I’ll explain what parachains are, how they work within Kusama, and how you can participate in Kusuama crowd loans. #ksm #kusama #defi Timestamps 00:00 Introduction 01:26 Parachain

articles.title: Ethereum Co-Founder Reveals Why He Is Incredibly Bullish On Polkadot & Cardano
articles.description: Ethereum co-founder Anthony Di Lorio has revealed he’s a big fan of both Polkadot and Cardano and is confident in both their futures on the basis of their creators’ reputations. articles.title: Bitcoin Wallet Joins 12 Largest Fundraising Rounds In Crypto History
articles.description: Hardware wallet maker Ledger has taken the number four spot on Forbes’ list of biggest fundraising rounds in crypto and blockchain after it announced it raised $380 million in a series C round.
